About UnThink

What is UnThink?

UnThink is a 12-hour ideathon co-organized by the Programmers' Club (PC) and the Entrepreneurship Development Cell (EDC). It is a call to every coder, designer, and problem solver to challenge the status quo and engineer solutions that matter.

The name says it all: unthink what you know. Disrupt. Reimagine. Create. Whether you are a seasoned builder or a first-time participant, UnThink is your arena to collaborate, compete, and leave your mark.

“Unthink the ordinary. Engineer the extraordinary.”

12

Hours of Innovation

50

Teams Shortlisted

2–4

Members per Team

2

Rounds to Glory

What is an Ideathon?

An Ideathon is a time-bound, high-energy event where teams of developers, designers, and problem solvers come together to ideate, build, and present creative solutions to real-world challenges using technology — all within a set timeframe.

💡

Ideate

Brainstorm bold ideas that solve real-world problems.

🔨

Build

Prototype and craft your solution under the clock.

🎤

Pitch

Present your vision to judges, mentors & investors.

🏆

Win

Compete for prizes, recognition and incubation support.

Journey

Event Timeline

Every milestone from registration to final announcements.

Phase 1

Online Submission

Phase 2

Screening + Shortlist

Finale

Offline Pitch Day

🚀 Registration Opens

Applications are now open for all eligible student teams.

Milestone 01

16 March 2026

📝 Idea Submission Deadline

Last date to submit your startup concept and problem statement.

Milestone 02

2nd April 2026

💻 Round 1 – Online Screening

All submissions are evaluated on innovation, feasibility, and impact.

In Review

4 April 2026

📢 Top 50 Teams Announcement

Shortlisted teams advance to the offline final at campus.

Upcoming

6 April 2026

🏁 Offline Round (On Campus)

Final round runs from 8:00 AM to 8:00 PM with live pitching.

Main Event

11 April 2026 (8:00 AM - 8:00 PM)

🏆 Announcement

Final results and award announcements are made after the offline round.

Finale

11 April 2026

Registration

Secure Your Spot at UnThink 2026

Ready to challenge your creativity and innovation? Register for UnThink 2026 and join a community of thinkers, builders, and entrepreneurs. Submit your team details through the official Google Form and secure your place in this exciting ideathon experience.

Register Now ↗

Complete the Google Form to confirm your team entry for the screening round.

Rewards

Prizes & Awards

Compete for cash prizes and real startup opportunities.

🥇 First Prize

₹10,000

🥈 Second Prize

₹7,000

🥉 Third Prize

₹5,000

Top 5 Teams

Top 5 teams will get direct exposure to potential investors and startup mentors.

Support

FAQs

Who can participate?

Any undergraduate or postgraduate student can participate.

What is the team size?

Each team must have 2 to 4 members.

Is there a registration fee?

Yes. A one-time fee of ₹400 is applicable per team.

Do shortlisted teams pay extra for Round 2?

No. There are no additional charges after registration.
